6.5 Electrical Characteristics

$T_J = -40^\circ\text{C}$ to $150^\circ\text{C}$, $VIN = 12\text{V}$ (unless otherwise noted)

| PARAMETER | TEST CONDITIONS | MIN | TYP | MAX | UNIT |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| SUPPLY CURRENT | | | | | |
| $I_{\text{VIN}}$ (Operating – non-switching supply current) | $V_{\text{IN}}$ current, $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $EN = 5\text{V}$, $V_{\text{FB}} = 0.8\text{V}$ | TPS562200 | 230 | 330 | $\mu\text{A}$ |
| $I_{\text{VINSDN}}$ (Shutdown supply current) | $V_{\text{IN}}$ current, $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $EN = 0\text{V}$ | TPS563200 | 190 | 290 | $\mu\text{A}$ |
| LOGIC THRESHOLD | | | | | |
| $V_{\text{EN(H)}}$ EN high-level input voltage | EN | 1.6 | | | V |
| $V_{\text{EN(L)}}$ EN low-level input voltage | EN | | 0.6 | | V |
| $R_{\text{EN}}$ EN pin resistance to GND | $V_{\text{EN}} = 12\text{V}$ | 225 | 450 | 900 | k$\Omega$ |
| $V_{\text{FB}}$ VOLTAGE AND DISCHARGE RESISTANCE | | | | | |
| $V_{\text{FB(TH)}}$ $V_{\text{FB}}$ threshold voltage | $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $V_O = 1.05\text{V}$, $I_O = 10\text{mA}$, Eco-mode operation | 772 | | mV |
| $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $V_O = 1.05\text{V}$, continuous mode operation | 758 | 765 | 772 | mV |
| $I_{\text{VFB}}$ $V_{\text{FB}}$ input current | $V_{\text{FB}} = 0.8\text{V}$, $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | 0 | $\pm 0.1$ | $\mu\text{A}$ |
| MOSFET | | | | | |
| $R_{\text{DS(on)h}}$ High side switch resistance | $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $V_{\text{BST}} - SW = 5.5\text{V}$ | TPS562200 | 122 | m$\Omega$ |
| $R_{\text{DS(on)l}}$ Low side switch resistance | $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | TPS562200 | 72 | m$\Omega$ |
| $R_{\text{DS(on)l}}$ Low side switch resistance | $T_A = 25^\circ\text{C}$ | TPS562200 | 72 | m$\Omega$ |
| CURRENT LIMIT | | | | | |
| $I_{\text{ocl}}$ Current limit (1) | DC current, $V_{\text{OUT}} = 1.05\text{V}$, $L_{\text{OUT}} = 2.2\text{µF}$ | TPS562200 | 2.5 | 3.2 | 4.3 | A |
| $I_{\text{ocl}}$ Current limit (1) | DC current, $V_{\text{OUT}} = 1.05\text{V}$, $L_{\text{OUT}} = 1.5\text{µF}$ | TPS562200 | 3.5 | 4.2 | 5.3 | A |

THERMAL SHUTDOWN

$T_{\text{SDN}}$ Thermal shutdown threshold (1) Shutdown temperature 155 Hysteresis 35
